items.title: A fourth color variant of the Samsung Galaxy A27 just leaked
items.title_zh: A fourth color variant of the Samsung Galaxy A27 just leaked
items.snippet: Samsung Galaxy A27 now confirmed in 4 colors: Awesome Mint joins Black, Blue, and Pink. Full leaked specs include Snapdragon 6 Gen 3, no microSD, and 5MP ultrawide downgrade.
snippet_zh: Samsung Galaxy A27 now confirmed in 4 colors: Awesome Mint joins Black, Blue, and Pink. Full leaked specs include Snapdragon 6 Gen 3, no microSD, and 5MP ultrawide downgrade.

items.title: Valve Confirms Steam Machine and Steam Frame Are Coming This Summer
items.title_zh: Valve Confirms Steam Machine and Steam Frame Are Coming This Summer
items.snippet: Valve confirmed Steam Machine and Steam Frame launch this summer via a developer blog — Verified program extended to both, pricing expected to disappoint.
snippet_zh: Valve confirmed Steam Machine and Steam Frame launch this summer via a developer blog — Verified program extended to both, pricing expected to disappoint.

items.title: This iQOO Neo 12 Leak Can Prove OnePlus So Wrong
items.title_zh: This iQOO Neo 12 Leak Can Prove OnePlus So Wrong
items.snippet: Digital Chat Station confirmed iQOO Neo 12 features a 2K 165Hz display — potentially 185Hz — proving OnePlus wrong after claiming it was technically impossible.
snippet_zh: Digital Chat Station confirmed iQOO Neo 12 features a 2K 165Hz display — potentially 185Hz — proving OnePlus wrong after claiming it was technically impossible.

items.title: Imagen AI Review: A Practical AI Editing Assistant Built for Efficiency
items.title_zh: Imagen AI Review: A Practical AI Editing Assistant Built for Efficiency
items.snippet: Can AI really speed up photo editing? We tested Imagen AI to see how well it handles editing, culling, and workflow automation for professional photographers.
snippet_zh: Can AI really speed up photo editing? We tested Imagen AI to see how well it handles editing, culling, and workflow automation for professional photographers.

items.title: Vivo X500 Ultra Drops 10x Zoom Plans!
items.title_zh: Vivo X500 Ultra Drops 10x Zoom Plans!
items.snippet: Vivo X500 Ultra scrapped its 10x telephoto prototype — OPPO Find X10 Ultra confirmed as the only 2027 flagship with dual periscope and 10x super zoom confirmed.
snippet_zh: Vivo X500 Ultra scrapped its 10x telephoto prototype — OPPO Find X10 Ultra confirmed as the only 2027 flagship with dual periscope and 10x super zoom confirmed.

items.title: Galaxy S27 Pro Battery Leak Suggests Something Unthinkable
items.title_zh: Galaxy S27 Pro Battery Leak Suggests Something Unthinkable
items.snippet: Galaxy S27 Pro battery leaked at 5,000mAh — smaller screen than Ultra means comparable endurance, plus a dedicated 50MP telephoto the Ultra reportedly drops.
snippet_zh: Galaxy S27 Pro battery leaked at 5,000mAh — smaller screen than Ultra means comparable endurance, plus a dedicated 50MP telephoto the Ultra reportedly drops.

items.title: iPhone 18 Pro Dummy Units Surface in Dark Cherry, Light Blue, Black, and Silver
items.title_zh: iPhone 18 Pro Dummy Units Surface in Dark Cherry, Light Blue, Black, and Silver
items.snippet: iPhone 18 Pro dummy units leaked in Dark Cherry, Light Blue, Black, and Silver — design matches iPhone 17 Pro as Apple experiments with bolder Pro color options.
snippet_zh: iPhone 18 Pro dummy units leaked in Dark Cherry, Light Blue, Black, and Silver — design matches iPhone 17 Pro as Apple experiments with bolder Pro color options.

items.title: OnePlus 16 and iQOO 16 Both Launching in September
items.title_zh: OnePlus 16 and iQOO 16 Both Launching in September
items.snippet: Digital Chat Station confirmed OnePlus 16 and iQOO 16 are targeting September China launches — a month earlier than last year, global availability from late October.
snippet_zh: Digital Chat Station confirmed OnePlus 16 and iQOO 16 are targeting September China launches — a month earlier than last year, global availability from late October.

items.title: RedMagic Astra 2 Just Cleared Chinese Certification
items.title_zh: RedMagic Astra 2 Just Cleared Chinese Certification
items.snippet: The Astra 2's 8,300mAh battery is smaller because the liquid cooling loop takes internal space — a deliberate trade-off. 185Hz OLED, 80W, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5.
snippet_zh: The Astra 2's 8,300mAh battery is smaller because the liquid cooling loop takes internal space — a deliberate trade-off. 185Hz OLED, 80W, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5.

items.title: Google Just Brought AI to Phones With 2GB of RAM
items.title_zh: Google Just Brought AI to Phones With 2GB of RAM
items.snippet: Google launched Gemini Go for Android Go devices with 2GB RAM — replacing Assistant Go with a conversational AI that handles calls, texts, location queries, and file uploads.
snippet_zh: Google launched Gemini Go for Android Go devices with 2GB RAM — replacing Assistant Go with a conversational AI that handles calls, texts, location queries, and file uploads.

items.title: Xiaomi 17T Series Returns to China on June 8
items.title_zh: Xiaomi 17T Series Returns to China on June 8
items.snippet: Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro launch in China for the first time on June 8 — with 7,000mAh 16% silicon battery, 100W charging, Dimensity 9500, and Leica cameras. Full breakdown.
snippet_zh: Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro launch in China for the first time on June 8 — with 7,000mAh 16% silicon battery, 100W charging, Dimensity 9500, and Leica cameras. Full breakdown.

items.title: Vivo X Fold 6 Battery Confirmed at 6,900mAh — the Biggest Ever in a Vivo Foldable
items.title_zh: Vivo X Fold 6 Battery Confirmed at 6,900mAh — the Biggest Ever in a Vivo Foldable
items.snippet: Vivo X Fold 6 leaks confirmed: 6,900mAh battery, Dimensity 9500, 8.02-inch 2K inner display, 200MP main camera, and wireless charging. Late June 2026 China launch.
snippet_zh: Vivo X Fold 6 leaks confirmed: 6,900mAh battery, Dimensity 9500, 8.02-inch 2K inner display, 200MP main camera, and wireless charging. Late June 2026 China launch.

items.title: HONOR Magic V6 Officially Launches Globally, Pre-Orders Open in First Markets
items.title_zh: HONOR Magic V6 Officially Launches Globally, Pre-Orders Open in First Markets

snippet_zh: HONOR has officially launched the Honor Magic V6 foldable smartphone. The device features a 6,660mAh battery, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, AI productivity tools, and more.

items.title: OPPO and Vivo Are Both Building 200MP Pocket Cameras - DJI could be in trouble?
items.title_zh: OPPO and Vivo Are Both Building 200MP Pocket Cameras - DJI could be in trouble?
items.snippet: OPPO and Vivo are building 200MP pocket gimbal cameras using Sony's LYT-901 sensor — with Hasselblad and Zeiss branding respectively. Both target DJI's Osmo Pocket series.
snippet_zh: OPPO and Vivo are building 200MP pocket gimbal cameras using Sony's LYT-901 sensor — with Hasselblad and Zeiss branding respectively. Both target DJI's Osmo Pocket series.

items.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ Launches with Periscope Camera, 50x Zoom, and 6,500mAh battery
items.title_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ Launches with Periscope Camera, 50x Zoom, and 6,500mAh battery
items.snippet: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ launches at Rs 47,999 in India with four 50MP cameras, 6,500mAh silicon-carbon battery, 90W wired and 15W wireless charging. Full specs inside.
snippet_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ launches at Rs 47,999 in India with four 50MP cameras, 6,500mAh silicon-carbon battery, 90W wired and 15W wireless charging. Full specs inside.

items.title: Amazfit Balance 3 Is Official: 21-Day Battery and a 3,000 Nits display
items.title_zh: Amazfit Balance 3 Is Official: 21-Day Battery and a 3,000 Nits display

snippet_zh: Amazfit Balance 3 launched June 2 at $369.99 with 3,000 nits AMOLED, sapphire glass, 21-day battery, dual-band GPS, HYROX support, and 64GB storage. Full specs here.

items.title: OnePlus Turbo 6X Is Launching Before June 18 - Priced just under $150
items.title_zh: OnePlus Turbo 6X Is Launching Before June 18 - Priced just under $150
items.snippet: OnePlus Turbo 6X launches in China before June 18 with 7,000mAh battery, 144Hz LCD, and Dimensity 7300 under $150. The Pro adds OLED, 8,000mAh, and IP69X. Full specs here.
snippet_zh: OnePlus Turbo 6X launches in China before June 18 with 7,000mAh battery, 144Hz LCD, and Dimensity 7300 under $150. The Pro adds OLED, 8,000mAh, and IP69X. Full specs here.

items.title: Realme's new beast is here: 3 Days of Battery on One Charge
items.title_zh: Realme's new beast is here: 3 Days of Battery on One Charge

snippet_zh: Realme P4R 5G launches June 10 in India with 8,000mAh silicon-carbon battery, 45W charging, 6.8-inch 144Hz display, and three-day endurance claims.

items.title: WPS Office Review 2026: A Solid Office Replacement with AI Features that Don’t Feel Exaggerated
items.title_zh: WPS Office Review 2026: A Solid Office Replacement with AI Features that Don’t Feel Exaggerated
items.snippet: WPS Office offers a familiar Microsoft Office-style experience at a much lower cost. With strong PDF tools, useful AI features, and excellent performance.
snippet_zh: WPS Office offers a familiar Microsoft Office-style experience at a much lower cost. With strong PDF tools, useful AI features, and excellent performance.
